info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix/status \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"enabled":true}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"enabled\":true}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix/status", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"defaultRole":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"defaultRole\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix/admin-user \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"userIds":["string"]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"userIds\":[\"string\"]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix/admin-user", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","description":"string","enabled":true,"tables":[{"tableId":"string","disabledActions":["string"],"fieldRecordPermission":[{"fieldId":"string","disabledActions":["string"]}],"recordFilter":{},"enabledViewIds":["string"],"enabled":true}],"nodes":[{"nodeType":"workflow","nodeId":"string","enabled":true}]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"enabled\":true,\"tables\":[{\"tableId\":\"string\",\"disabledActions\":[\"string\"],\"fieldRecordPermission\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"disabledActions\":[\"string\"]}],\"recordFilter\":{},\"enabledViewIds\":[\"string\"],\"enabled\":true}],\"nodes\":[{\"nodeType\":\"workflow\",\"nodeId\":\"string\",\"enabled\":true}]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role/%7BauthorityMatrixRoleId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

get.description: Get authority matrix table link records

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role-table/%7BtableId%7D/filter-link-records?authorityMatrixRoleId=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/authority-matrix-role-table/%7BtableId%7D/filter-link-records?authorityMatrixRoleId=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
